_comment: Safe Zone V2.5 priors. All rects are normalized [x,y,width,height] in the FINAL 9:16 output frame (e.g. 1080x1920), x/y = top-left. The Shorts-UI zones are fixed platform overlays captions/content must avoid; caption candidate zones are tried in order by the confidence loop; facecam_band is where the facecam-top layout places the cam.

shortsUI._comment: YouTube Shorts native overlays — hard exclusion zones for captions.

captionCandidateZones._note: above bottom metadata, left of action rail — default readable band
below the facecam band; for fullscreen-gameplay scenes

temporal._comment: EMA smoothing of the chosen safe-zone rect across frames/scenes. alpha is the weight of the NEW observation; lower = smoother. Re-seed (no smoothing) on a scene cut or when the facecam/crop changes.
